title: Alchemical Emblems — Gallery 8
description: 40 emblems from the Splendor Solis tradition and other alchemical visionaries. Trismosin's Splendor Solis, Jamsthaler's Viatorium spagyricum, Khunrath's Amphitheatrum sapientiae, and figural emblems of the alchemical process as spiritual transformation, with the raven, phoenix, pelican, and hermetic rose.
notes: Splendor Solis illuminations are among the finest alchemical art — use for beauty/opus sections.
